recommendations.title: What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?
recommendations.overview: A former vaudeville child star viciously torments her paraplegic sister in their decaying Hollywood mansion.

recommendations.title: Emperor of the North
recommendations.overview: Hobos encounter a sadistic railway conductor that will not let anyone "ride the rails" for free.

recommendations.title: The Dirty Dozen
recommendations.overview: 12 American military prisoners in World War II are ordered to infiltrate a well-guarded enemy château and kill the Nazi officers vacationing there. The soldiers, most of whom are facing death sentences for a variety of violent crimes, agree to the mi

recommendations.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
recommendations.overview: An aging, reclusive Southern belle plagued by a horrifying family secret descends into madness after the arrival of a lost relative.

recommendations.title: Attack
recommendations.overview: Battle of the Bulge, World War II, 1944. Lieutenant Costa, an infantry company officer who must establish artillery observation posts in a strategic area, has serious doubts about Captain Cooney's leadership ability.

recommendations.title: Ulzana's Raid
recommendations.overview: After fierce war chief Ulzana and a small war party jump the reservation bent on murder and terror, an inexperienced young lieutenant is assigned to track him down.

recommendations.title: The Frisco Kid
recommendations.overview: Rabbi Avram arrives in Philadelphia from Poland en route to San Francisco where he will be a congregation's new rabbi. An innocent and inexperienced traveller, he is tricked by con men to pay for the trip to go west, then they leave him and his belon

recommendations.title: The Longest Yard
recommendations.overview: A football player-turned-convict organizes a team of inmates to play against a team of prison guards. His dilemma is that the warden asks him to throw the game in return for an early release, but he is also concerned about the inmates' lack of self-e

recommendations.title: Apache
recommendations.overview: Following the surrender of Geronimo, Massai, the last Apache warrior is captured and scheduled for transportation to a Florida reservation. On the way he manages to escape and heads for his homeland to win back his girl and settle down to grow crops.

recommendations.title: Vera Cruz
recommendations.overview: After the American Civil War, mercenaries travel to Mexico to fight in their revolution for money. The former soldier and gentleman Benjamin Trane meets the gunman and killer Joe Erin and his men, and together they are hired by the Emperor Maximillia
